Interface EnversRevisionRepository<T, ID extends Serializable, N extends Number & Comparable<N>>

All Superinterfaces:
CrudRepository<T,ID>, JpaRepository<T,ID>, ListCrudRepository<T,ID>, ListPagingAndSortingRepository<T,ID>, PagingAndSortingRepository<T,ID>, QueryByExampleExecutor<T>, Repository<T,ID>, RevisionRepository<T,ID,N>
@Deprecated @NoRepositoryBean public interface EnversRevisionRepository<T, ID extends Serializable, N extends Number & Comparable<N>> extends RevisionRepository<T,ID,N>, JpaRepository<T,ID>
Deprecated.
since 1.1, in favor of simply extending RevisionRepository.
Convenience interface to allow pulling in JpaRepository and RevisionRepository functionality in one go.
Author:
Oliver Gierke, Michael Igler
